summary: Google Play Store badges feature testing complete. All 9 tests passed. Verified hero-play-store, download-app-section with app card (4.8 rating, 234 reviews, +5.000 downloads), download-app-cta with 'Instalar gratis', urgency-play-store with '4.8 en Google Play', testimonials-play-store with 'Descargar en Google Play', footer-play-store-badge with rating stars, and mobile-sticky-play-store. All Play Store links correctly point to https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.manoprotect.www.twa
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Play Store badges feature fully implemented and tested. All data-testids verified: hero-play-store, download-app-section, download-app-cta, urgency-play-store, testimonials-play-store, footer-play-store-badge, mobile-sticky-play-store. Note: Page has urgency popup that appears on load - close it first before testing. Cookie banner also appears.
